title: Add automatic domain classification, legal document analysis, smart timetable, quiz generation, and revision tracking

requirements.summary: Add legal document analysis capability with structured explanations of clauses, obligations, rights, dates, and parties
acceptanceCriteria: Legal documents can be uploaded alongside medical reports
System extracts and explains key legal terms, obligations, and parties
Analysis results are displayed in a structured, readable format similar to medical report analysis
Users can view detailed breakdowns of legal document contents

file_operations.description: Create component to display structured legal document analysis including clauses, obligations, rights, parties, and dates in an easy-to-read format with expandable sections for detailed explanations
Update to handle both medical and legal document types, display appropriate icons and labels based on domain classification, and route to correct analysis view
Modify to conditionally render LegalAnalysisView for legal documents or existing medical analysis for medical reports based on document domain
Add React Query hooks for fetching legal analysis data and saving legal analysis results using the backend's getLegalAnalysis and saveLegalAnalysis methods

requirements.summary: Create smart timetable feature for students with class schedules, study sessions, and deadlines in calendar view
acceptanceCriteria: Students can create and manage timetable entries with dates, times, and descriptions
Timetable displays in a calendar or schedule view
System stores timetable data persistently per user
Interface is accessible from main navigation

file_operations.description: Create timetable management page with calendar/schedule view displaying entries by date and time, including add entry button and empty state for new users
Create card component to display individual timetable entry with type badge, title, time range, location, recurring indicator, and delete action
Create form component for creating timetable entries with entry type dropdown (classes, studySession, exam, deadline, other), title, start/end time pickers, location, and recurring checkbox
Create React Query hooks for timetable CRUD operations including getUserTimetableEntries, createTimetableEntry, and deleteTimetableEntry with automatic cache invalidation
Add 'Timetable' navigation link in header menu alongside Notes and Reports, maintaining consistent styling with existing navigation items
Add route configuration for TimetablePage at /timetable path with authentication guard ensuring only logged-in users can access

requirements.summary: Implement automatic quiz generation from notes and documents with comprehension testing and result tracking
acceptanceCriteria: System generates quiz questions from user's notes and document content
Quiz questions test comprehension of material stored in the app
Users can take generated quizzes and see results
Quiz history is tracked per user

file_operations.description: Create quizzes management page displaying list of generated quizzes with titles and creation dates, including generate quiz button and empty state prompting first quiz generation
Create card component to display quiz summary with title, question count, creation timestamp, and button to start quiz
Create interactive quiz-taking component that displays questions one at a time with multiple choice options, tracks selected answers, shows progress, and displays results summary at completion
Create dialog component allowing users to trigger quiz generation with title input and source material selection, showing generation progress and success confirmation
Create React Query hooks for quiz operations including getUserQuizzes, getQuiz, and saveQuiz with automatic cache invalidation after quiz creation
Add 'Quizzes' navigation link in header menu alongside existing navigation items, maintaining consistent styling and positioning
Add route configuration for QuizzesPage at /quizzes path with authentication guard ensuring only logged-in users can access

requirements.summary: Add revision reminder system with scheduled alerts, revision count tracking, and timetable integration
acceptanceCriteria: System sends reminders for revision at scheduled intervals
Revision count is tracked for each note or topic
Users can see how many times they have revised each item
Reminders integrate with timetable schedule

file_operations.description: Create reminders management page displaying active and inactive revision reminders with topic, next revision date, revision count, and activation toggle in list or card grid format
Create card component to display revision reminder with topic name, times revised badge, next revision date, active status indicator, and actions to mark as revised or deactivate
Create form component for creating revision reminders with topic input, initial revision count, and next revision date picker
Create React Query hooks for reminder operations including getUserReminders, createRevisionReminder, updateReminder, and deactivateReminder with automatic cache invalidation
Add 'Reminders' navigation link in header menu alongside existing navigation items, maintaining consistent styling and positioning
Add route configuration for RemindersPage at /reminders path with authentication guard ensuring only logged-in users can access

requirements.summary: Enhance AI-powered notes with intelligent suggestions, summaries, and key point extraction using NLP
acceptanceCriteria: AI provides automatic summaries or key points for notes
NLP-based insights are displayed within note interface
Users see clear value-add from AI processing of their notes

file_operations.description: Add AI insights section displaying auto-generated summary or key points below note content preview with distinct styling to highlight AI-enhanced value
Add AI suggestions panel or button that triggers intelligent content analysis, showing summaries and key points during editing with option to incorporate suggestions
Update notes display to prominently feature AI-enhanced notes with badges or indicators showing which notes have AI-generated insights

requirements.summary: Remove explicit domain selection UI and present unified interface where classification happens automatically
acceptanceCriteria: No dropdown or radio buttons for domain selection exist in upload flow
Upload interface is unified for all document types
Domain is determined automatically and transparently

file_operations.description: Remove any domain selection dropdown or radio buttons from upload interface, simplify to single file upload field with unified messaging indicating system will automatically classify document type
Update upload dialog and instructions to reflect automatic domain classification, removing references to manual domain selection and emphasizing unified document upload experience

requirements.summary: Refine overall UI for polished, professional appearance with consistent spacing, clear hierarchy, smooth transitions, and intuitive navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Interface has consistent styling and spacing across all pages
Navigation is intuitive with clear labels and logical flow
Visual design appears polished and professional
All features are easily discoverable and accessible

file_operations.description: Refine global styles for consistent spacing scale, smooth transitions on interactive elements, and enhanced visual hierarchy while maintaining warm amber/orange palette
Polish header navigation with improved spacing, clear active states, consistent hover effects, and logical grouping of navigation items (Notes, Reports, Timetable, Quizzes, Reminders)
Enhance page layout with consistent grid spacing, polished empty states with clear call-to-action, and smooth transitions for modal dialogs
Refine page layout with consistent card grid spacing, professional empty state design, and smooth upload dialog transitions

Update hero section and feature grid to reflect all new capabilities (legal analysis, timetable, quizzes, reminders) with consistent spacing and professional visual hierarchy. Verify usage of generated hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png and medical-icon.dim_128x128.png assets located at frontend/public/assets/generated/
Refine card styling with consistent padding, clear visual hierarchy between title and content, polished action buttons, and smooth hover transitions
Enhance card design with consistent spacing, clear status badges, professional typography, and smooth interaction states
